pool.title: ZFS Pool
pool.description: ZFS pool name (defaults to provider DEFAULT_POOL)

nic_attach.title: NIC Attach
nic_attach.description: Network interface for VM NIC — can be a bridge (br100), VLAN (vlan666), or physical interface (enp5s0). Defaults to provider DEFAULT_NIC_ATTACH.

extensions.title: Extra Extensions
extensions.description: Additional Talos system extensions (e.g., siderolabs/iscsi-tools). qemu-guest-agent, nfs-utils, and util-linux-tools are always included.

encrypted.title: Encrypted Disk
encrypted.description: Enable ZFS native encryption (AES-256-GCM) on the VM disk. Requires ENCRYPTION_PASSPHRASE env var on the provider.
